name: LISATA THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Lisata Therapeutics, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, the Company) is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company dedicated to the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative therapies for the treatment of solid tumors and other serious diseases.
